text: Hello! That's Mei, a goat from the 2005 Japanese animated film adaptation Yūichi Kimura children's novel, ''Arashi no Yoru ni (Which translates to ''One Stormy Night'')''. While the gender is unmentioned in the original book, Mei is depicted as a male goat in the film and a female goat in the 2012 TV series ''Arashi no Yoru ni: Himitsu no Tomodachi (Which translates to ''One Stormy Night: Secret Friends'')''.
